query: Hi! I travel quite a bit for work — usually 2-3 flights a month. What card would suit me best?

params.query: credit card for frequent travelers with flight benefits

steps.result:
Apex Sapphire Travel Card (Credit Card, £250.0/yr): The Apex Sapphire Travel Card is designed for the modern frequent traveller. With access to over 1,000 airport lounges globally, zero foreign transaction fees, and a generous 2x points multiplier on all travel and dining purchases, this card transforms every journey into a rewarding experience. The $200 annual travel credit effectively offsets most of the annual fee for regular travellers. Airport lounge access worldwide 2x points on travel and dining No foreign transaction fees $200 annual travel credit Comprehensive travel insurance
Apex Voyager Premium Card (Credit Card, £450.0/yr): The Apex Voyager Premium Card is our flagship travel card for those who demand the very best. With unlimited lounge access for you and two guests, complimentary hotel elite status, a $500 annual travel credit, and a dedicated concierge service, every trip becomes an elevated experience. The 3x points on travel, dining, and entertainment ensure your rewards accumulate rapidly. Unlimited airport lounge access for cardholder + 2 guests 3x points on travel, dining, and entertainment Complimentary hotel elite status $500 annual travel credit Comprehensive travel and purchase insurance Dedicated concierge service
Apex Explorer Card (Credit Card, £95.0/yr): The Apex Explorer Card is the ideal entry point for travellers who want solid rewards without the premium price tag. With no foreign transaction fees, a 1.5x points multiplier on every purchase, and a $50 annual travel credit, this card suits anyone who takes a few trips a year and wants their spending to count toward something meaningful. No foreign transaction fees 1.5x points on all purchases Basic travel insurance $50 annual travel credit Free additional card for a travel companion

steps.content:
Based on your travel frequency, here are two credit card options that might suit you best:

*   **Apex Sapphire Travel Card:** This card has an annual fee of £250. It offers access to over 1,000 airport lounges globally, 2x points on all travel and dining purchases, no foreign transaction fees, and a $200 annual travel credit. This card is great for frequent travelers looking for solid travel benefits.

*   **Apex Voyager Premium Card:** With an annual fee of £450, this is a more premium option. It provides unlimited lounge access for you and two guests, 3x points on travel, dining, and entertainment, complimentary hotel elite status, and a $500 annual travel credit. This card is ideal if you're looking for top-tier travel perks and don't mind a higher annual fee.

The Apex Explorer Card (£95/year) is also available, but it offers fewer benefits and might not be as rewarding for someone who travels as frequently as you do.
